---
title: "Scott Wilson"
subtitle: "Neuroscientist · MRC Laboratory of Molecular Biology, Cambridge"
---

```{=html}
<div class="netwrap" aria-hidden="true"><canvas id="net"></canvas></div>
<script>
(function(){
  var wrap=document.querySelector('.netwrap'), c=document.getElementById('net');
  if(!c||!wrap) return;
  var ctx=c.getContext('2d'), DPR=Math.max(1,window.devicePixelRatio||1);
  var W=0,H=0,nodes=[],edges=[],pulses=[],raf;
  var AMBER='#b06a1b', INK='43,38,32';
  var reduce=window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  function rand(a,b){return a+Math.random()*(b-a);}
  function spawn(){var e=edges[(Math.random()*edges.length)|0]; return {e:e,t:Math.random(),sp:rand(.0016,.0042)};}
  function build(){
    W=wrap.clientWidth; H=wrap.clientHeight;
    c.width=W*DPR; c.height=H*DPR; c.style.width=W+'px'; c.style.height=H+'px';
    ctx.setTransform(DPR,0,0,DPR,0,0);
    var N=Math.max(14,Math.min(36,Math.round(W/32)));
    nodes=[]; for(var i=0;i<N;i++){nodes.push({x:rand(6,W-6),y:rand(6,H-6),vx:rand(-.12,.12),vy:rand(-.12,.12)});}
    edges=[]; var seen={};
    for(var i=0;i<N;i++){var d=[];
      for(var j=0;j<N;j++){if(i!==j){var dx=nodes[i].x-nodes[j].x,dy=nodes[i].y-nodes[j].y; d.push([dx*dx+dy*dy,j]);}}
      d.sort(function(a,b){return a[0]-b[0];});
      for(var k=0;k<2;k++){var j=d[k][1],key=Math.min(i,j)+'-'+Math.max(i,j); if(!seen[key]){seen[key]=1; edges.push([i,j]);}}}
    pulses=[]; var P=reduce?0:Math.min(9,Math.round(edges.length/4));
    for(var p=0;p<P;p++){pulses.push(spawn());}
  }
  function draw(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.lineWidth=1;
    for(var i=0;i<edges.length;i++){var a=nodes[edges[i][0]],b=nodes[edges[i][1]];
      ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(176,106,27,0.16)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(a.x,a.y); ctx.lineTo(b.x,b.y); ctx.stroke();}
    for(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){var n=nodes[i]; ctx.fillStyle='rgba('+INK+',0.5)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(n.x,n.y,1.6,0,6.283); ctx.fill();}
    for(var i=0;i<pulses.length;i++){var pu=pulses[i],a=nodes[pu.e[0]],b=nodes[pu.e[1]];
      var x=a.x+(b.x-a.x)*pu.t,y=a.y+(b.y-a.y)*pu.t;
      ctx.save(); ctx.shadowColor=AMBER; ctx.shadowBlur=8; ctx.fillStyle=AMBER;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x,y,2.4,0,6.283); ctx.fill(); ctx.restore();}
  }
  function step(){
    for(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){var n=nodes[i]; n.x+=n.vx; n.y+=n.vy;
      if(n.x<4||n.x>W-4)n.vx*=-1; if(n.y<4||n.y>H-4)n.vy*=-1;}
    for(var i=0;i<pulses.length;i++){pulses[i].t+=pulses[i].sp; if(pulses[i].t>=1)pulses[i]=spawn();}
    draw(); raf=requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }
  build(); draw(); if(!reduce) step();
  var rt; window.addEventListener('resize',function(){clearTimeout(rt);
    rt=setTimeout(function(){if(raf)cancelAnimationFrame(raf); build(); draw(); if(!reduce) step();},200);});
})();
</script>
```

![](assets/scott.jpg){.headshot fig-alt="Scott Wilson"}

I am a computational biologist, who has worked across various high dimensional
datasets to extract signal from noise. I recently completed my PhD in neuroscience
at the University of Cambridge. Eager to pursue a career which leads to macro-level,
positive outcomes across a changing world.

Before Cambridge I read Genetics at UCL and spent a research year at the Francis
Crick Institute. I'm part of the Santa Fe Institute working group on representation
in minds and artificial systems.

[Email](mailto:sc0ttwils0n@pm.me) · [GitHub](https://github.com/sc0ttwils0n)
<!-- Add when you have them: · [Google Scholar](URL) · [ORCID](URL) · [Bluesky](URL) -->

<!-- ============================================================
     ACADEMIC FAMILY TREE — space reserved for you.
     When your academictree.org page is ready, uncomment ONE of these:

     ## Academic family tree
     [My academic family tree](https://academictree.org/REPLACE-WITH-YOUR-URL)

     …or embed a snapshot image you export from the tree:
     ![](assets/tree.png){fig-alt="My academic family tree" width="100%"}
     ============================================================ -->
